full_text:
Liu Yong (Gongshou) 劉永 (公壽)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Yong (劉永), styledGongshou (公壽), was born in Zhuo county, Zhuo commandery. Protested corruption in the court but slandered by Huang Hao and kept afar. Liu Yong was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom, the Wei Kingdom, and the Jin Dynasty.
